DP.519.0000:
There’s an odd spaceman
in front of the ruins.\f
There isn’t anything there, but that
only seemed to make him get angry.\f
He’s saying he will blow the town
up with a bomb...\f
The nerve of it all...\f
If only I were younger, I’d punish
that spaceman with my Pokémon...
DP.519.0001:
This town is insignificant!
There’s nothing of value here.\f
It doesn’t need to exist, so I’ll
blow it up with a Galactic Bomb!\f
If you try to mess with me, I’ll shut
you down with a Pokémon battle.\f
So, what’s it going to be?
Are you going to mess with me?
DP.519.0002:
You dare to oppose Team Galactic?\f
That means you’re taking on the
world... No, the universe, even!\f
DP.519.0003:
That’s right! Very smart!
You know what’s good for you!\f
Team Galactic has come out to the
boonies like this for everyone’s sake.\f
Your cooperation is appreciated.
Now, where is my partner...?
DP.519.0004:
Too much to handle...
I can’t do anything here...\f
This place is nothing!
I’ll be happily rid of this place!\f
DP.519.0005:
Oh, you were magnificent!
Aren’t you quite the Trainer?\f
As the elder of Celestic Town, I give
you my thanks.\f
Oh? That Old Charm...
May I see that, dear?\f
...
What’s that?\f
You say Cynthia entrusted you with
it to deliver to me?\f
That Cynthia...
She’s my granddaughter.\f
DP.519.0006:
[0103,0000] handed over
the [0108,0001] to the elder.
DP.519.0007:
This Old Charm is something made in
Celestic Town long, long ago.\f
It was made in honor of a mythical
deity said to have created Sinnoh.\f
These Old Charms are still discovered
now and again.\f
Since you’re in Celestic Town, why not
look around inside the ruins?
DP.519.0008:
You’ve gone to the trouble
of visiting Celestic Town.\f
Why not take a little more time
to examine the ruins?
DP.519.0009:
There appears to have been
an insignificant struggle here.\f
Everyone should step back and view
things from a bigger perspective.\f
Yes, a bigger perspective, one that
is on a universal scale.\f
DP.519.0010:
My name is Cyrus.\f
I seek the power to create a new
world, a world without strife.\f
However, that power seems to be
unavailable here...\f
We’ve met before, yes?
It was at Mt. Coronet.\f
If you discover any power derived
from the legends of Sinnoh, inform me.\f
For that power is what I need to
create my new world.\f
DP.519.0011:
Howdy!
Studying up on local history?
DP.519.0012:
Hey, do you know what they say?\f
They say a Pokémon created the
Sinnoh region.
DP.519.0013:
There’s no Pokémon Mart in this
town...\f
Instead, you can buy and sell items
in this house here.
DP.519.0015:
A giant etching of a Pokémon-like
creature covers the wall...\f
There is some fading text etched
in as well...\f
The flow of time never stops...
The past, future, and present...
DP.519.0016:
A giant etching of a Pokémon-like
creature covers the wall...\f
There is some fading text etched
in as well...\f
Space is ever-expanding dimensions...
Our spirits, too, are as space...
